name: Green Leaf Plant in White Pot - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of green to your space with this Peperomia Leaf Plant in Pot from Threshold™. This artificial arrangement features a natural-looking peperomia leaf plant to add a vibrant touch to any space, and it comes potted inside a stoneware container for quick and easy display on any flat surface. Just place it in the entryway or living room to add an authentic touch of nature without needing maintenance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
